request: Fix data-corruption bug in .claude/skills/memory-flush/sweep.mjs: applyStaleAction (modeStaleSweep) and modeStampClosure use text.replace(block, updated) where String.replace interprets $`, $', $&, $n special patterns in the replacement string; entry bodies containing shell snippets with $ cause matched text to be re-injected, duplicating/corrupting the memory file. Replace with indexOf/slice splice or function replacer.
